This article about a location in [Donetsk Oblast](/wiki/Donetsk_Oblast "Donetsk Oblast") is a [stub](/wiki/Wikipedia:Stub "Wikipedia:Stub"). You can help Wikipedia by [adding missing information](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Kuibyshevskyi_District,_Donetsk&action=edit).

([Ukrainian](/wiki/Ukrainian_language "Ukrainian language"): [Куйбишевський район](https://uk.wikipedia.org/wiki/%D0%9A%D1%83%D0%B9%D0%B1%D0%B8%D1%88%D0%B5%D0%B2%D1%81%D1%8C%D0%BA%D0%B8%D0%B9_%D1%80%D0%B0%D0%B9%D0%BE%D0%BD_(%D0%94%D0%BE%D0%BD%D0%B5%D1%86%D1%8C%D0%BA) "uk:Куйбишевський район (Донецьк)"), [Russian](/wiki/Russian_language "Russian language"): [Куйбышевский район](https://ru.wikipedia.org/wiki/%D0%9A%D1%83%D0%B9%D0%B1%D1%8B%D1%88%D0%B5%D0%B2%D1%81%D0%BA%D0%B8%D0%B9_%D1%80%D0%B0%D0%B9%D0%BE%D0%BD_(%D0%94%D0%BE%D0%BD%D0%B5%D1%86%D0%BA) "ru:Куйбышевский район (Донецк)")) is an [urban district](/wiki/Urban_districts_of_Ukraine "Urban districts of Ukraine") of the city of [Donetsk](/wiki/Donetsk "Donetsk"), [Ukraine](/wiki/Ukraine "Ukraine"), named after a Soviet political figure [Valerian Kuybyshev](/wiki/Valerian_Kuybyshev "Valerian Kuybyshev").

[War in Donetsk: in a settlement of Zhovtnevyi Rudnyk for the fourth year is a zone of alienation (Война в Донецке: в поселке шахты "Октябрьская" четвертый год – зона отчуждения с концертами)](http://www.segodnya.ua/regions/donetsk/v-poselke-shahty-oktyabrskaya-chetvertyy-god-zona-otchuzhdeniya-s-koncertami-1025207.html). Segodnya. 30 May 2017

Urban district in Donetsk Oblast, Ukraine

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/2/24/Raions_of_Donetsk_and_Donetsk_City_Municipality.PNG/250px-Raions_of_Donetsk_and_Donetsk_City_Municipality.PNG)](/wiki/File:Raions_of_Donetsk_and_Donetsk_City_Municipality.PNG)

Districts of Donetsk on the territory of the Donetsk City Municipality:

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| Budonivskyi District  Voroshylovskyi District  Kalininskyi District  Kyivskyi District  Kirovskyi District | Kuibyshevskyi District  Leninskyi District  Petrovskyi District  Proletarskyi District |

**Kuibyshevskyi District** ([Ukrainian](/wiki/Ukrainian_language "Ukrainian language"): [Куйбишевський район](https://uk.wikipedia.org/wiki/%D0%9A%D1%83%D0%B9%D0%B1%D0%B8%D1%88%D0%B5%D0%B2%D1%81%D1%8C%D0%BA%D0%B8%D0%B9_%D1%80%D0%B0%D0%B9%D0%BE%D0%BD_(%D0%94%D0%BE%D0%BD%D0%B5%D1%86%D1%8C%D0%BA) "uk:Куйбишевський район (Донецьк)"), [Russian](/wiki/Russian_language "Russian language"): [Куйбышевский район](https://ru.wikipedia.org/wiki/%D0%9A%D1%83%D0%B9%D0%B1%D1%8B%D1%88%D0%B5%D0%B2%D1%81%D0%BA%D0%B8%D0%B9_%D1%80%D0%B0%D0%B9%D0%BE%D0%BD_(%D0%94%D0%BE%D0%BD%D0%B5%D1%86%D0%BA) "ru:Куйбышевский район (Донецк)")) is an [urban district](/wiki/Urban_districts_of_Ukraine "Urban districts of Ukraine") of the city of [Donetsk](/wiki/Donetsk "Donetsk"), [Ukraine](/wiki/Ukraine "Ukraine"), named after a Soviet political figure [Valerian Kuybyshev](/wiki/Valerian_Kuybyshev "Valerian Kuybyshev").

It was created in 1937 as one of the first six original city districts. It is located at the northwestern part of the city.

## Residential neighborhoods

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Kuibyshevskyi_District,_Donetsk&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Residential neighborhoods")]

Multi-storey developments

* Mahistralnyi
* Industrialnyi
* Azotnyi
* Zhylkop
* Karier
* Hirnyk
* Flora
* Zhovtneve
* Topaz
* Ploshcha Bakynskykh Komisariv

Settlements

* Smolyanka
* Zhovtneve
* Khimik
* Chervonyi Pakhar
* Hrabary
* Lozivske
* Administratyvnyi
* Hirnyk

## Industry

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Kuibyshevskyi_District,_Donetsk&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Industry")]

* Mines
  + [Zhovtnevyi Rudnyk coal mine](/wiki/Zhovtnevyi_Rudnyk_coal_mine "Zhovtnevyi Rudnyk coal mine") (part of the Donetsk Coal Power Company), flooded by militants of the [Donetsk People's Republic](/wiki/Donetsk_People%27s_Republic "Donetsk People's Republic")[[1]](#cite_note-1)
  + Kuibyshevska mine (part of the production association Donetskvuhillya), closed down
  + Maksim Gorky mine (part of the production association Donetskvuhillya)
  + Panfilovska mine (under the Mine Liquidation Administration), closed down
* Donetsk Coke-Production Factory, closed down
* Donbas Cable
* Topaz Factory, a military production factory with a design bureau of radio-technical instruments (among its products is [Kolchuga passive sensor](/wiki/Kolchuga_passive_sensor "Kolchuga passive sensor")) in 2016 relocated to Russia by militants of the Donetsk People's Republic
* Donetsk Factory of chemical agents
* Donetsk Factory of chemical products
